message:
chore(gitignore): ignore beads recovery directories and top-level snapshots

Two new patterns alongside the existing `.beads/.br_recovery/` entry:

- `.beads/recovery_*/` — timestamped recovery working directory
  produced by `br doctor` during a repair run (holds the repaired
  DB, SQL dump, and intermediate files).
- `.beads_snapshot_*/` — top-level snapshot of the entire `.beads/`
  tree taken before destructive operations.

Both are generated automatically; committing them pulls in tens of
MB of duplicated DB content that never belongs in the repo.
